---
title: "SCIMETAR LINE-1 qPCR batch correction"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 3
execute:
  warning: false
  error: false
  cache: true
---

## load precomputed csv and cell type annotation

```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=10, dev=c('png', 'pdf')}

library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(corrplot)
library(DT)

pcr2 <- read.csv('output/LINE1_qPCR_all.csv')

```

## batch correction with limma accounting for MspI wells
Use limma batch correction, use all wells 

### filtered by plate-wise cutoff N=1644
```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=10, dev=c('png', 'pdf')}
library(limma)

df <- pcr2 %>%
  filter(keep_median, dCt > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    Plate   = factor(Plate),
    group   = factor(group),
    Is_MspI = as.logical(Is_MspI),
    # merge all controls into ONE level so they’re preserved as a single mean
    group_preserve = factor(if_else(Is_MspI, "MspI_control", as.character(group)))
  )

# Design: preserve (i) one shared control mean, (ii) each biology group mean
design <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group_preserve, data = df)
colnames(design) <- levels(df$group_preserve)

# Matrix is features x samples (as limma expects)
mat <- t(as.matrix(df %>% select(HEX_Ref, FAM_Tar)))
batch <- df$Plate

mat_bc <- removeBatchEffect(mat, batch = batch, design = design)

df_bc <- df %>%
  mutate(
    HEX_Ref_bc = mat_bc["HEX_Ref", ],
    FAM_Tar_bc = mat_bc["FAM_Tar", ],
    dCt_adj = FAM_Tar_bc - HEX_Ref_bc
  )

# Before correction: control FAM-HEX by plate
p1 <- df %>%
  filter(Is_MspI) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Plate, y = dCt)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.12, outlier.size = 0.4) +
  labs(title = "Controls (Is_MspI): before batch correction", y = "FAM - HEX") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5))

# After correction: should align across plates much better
p2 <- df_bc %>%
  filter(Is_MspI) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Plate, y = dCt_adj)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.12, outlier.size = 0.4) +
  labs(title = "Controls (Is_MspI): after batch correction", y = "FAM - HEX (batch-corrected)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5))

patchwork::wrap_plots(p1,p2)

df_bc %>%
  # filter(Is_MspI) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x= factor(Plate), y = dCt_adj, fill = group)) +
  geom_violin(trim = F) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) + 
  facet_grid(~Is_MspI) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(y = "dCT value",
       x = "group",
       title = "MspI corrected dCT value by group (plate separated)")

cat("Summary of delta Ct values in passed wells before and after MspI correction.\n")
data.frame(before = df %>%
             group_by(Plate, Is_MspI) %>% 
             summarise(mean = mean(dCt, na.rm = T), median = median(dCt, na.rm = T)),
           after = df_bc %>% 
             group_by(Plate, Is_MspI) %>% 
             summarise(mean = mean(dCt_adj, na.rm = T), median = median(dCt_adj, na.rm = T))) %>%
  datatable() %>% formatRound(
    columns = c(3,4,7,8),
    digits  = 2
  )

data.frame(before = df %>%
             group_by(group, Is_MspI) %>% 
             summarise(mean = mean(dCt, na.rm = T), median = median(dCt, na.rm = T)),
           after = df_bc %>% group_by(group, Is_MspI) %>% 
             summarise(mean = mean(dCt_adj, na.rm = T), median = median(dCt_adj, na.rm = T))) %>%
  datatable() %>% formatRound(
    columns = c(3,4,7,8),
    digits  = 2
  )

pcr.all <- pcr2 %>% 
  left_join(df_bc %>% select(Plate_Well, HEX_Ref_bc, FAM_Tar_bc, dCt_adj), 
            by = 'Plate_Well') %>%
  rename(dCt_adj.limma_ctrl_p = dCt_adj)

```


```{r}
write.csv(pcr.all,
  "output/LINE1_qPCR_all_corrected.csv",
  row.names = F)

```
